title: TML Smart Contract ABI Bundle
description: Standard Application Binary Interface definitions for TML_Core.sol and ITMLEnforcer.sol. Contains function signatures, event logs, and structured data types only. No Solidity source code. Authority: TML Constitutionalization Monograph v3.3.
$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3 (PublicBlockchains, HybridShield), Section 8 (MoralTraceLogs anchoring). ABI output only. Solidity source is out of scope per Section 3.

TML_Core.description: Core constitutional enforcement contract. Manages Merkle-batched anchoring of Moral Trace Logs, Permission Token registration, and Emergency Override state transitions. Enforces the No Log = No Action iron law at the on-chain layer.
TML_Core.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3, Section 8, Section 13.3. Corresponds to Smart_Contracts/src/TML_Core.sol.

inputs.name: _custodianRegistry
inputs.description: Address of the HybridShield Tri-Cameral registry contract.

inputs.name: _enforcer
inputs.description: Address of the ITMLEnforcer implementation (HumanRightsMandate and EarthProtectionMandate enforcement).

inputs.name: _monographVersion
inputs.description: Canonical monograph version string, e.g. '3.3.0-tml-monograph-2025'.

abi.name: anchorMerkleRoot
abi.description: Anchors a Merkle root representing a batch of Moral Trace Logs to the public blockchain. This is the on-chain enforcement of AlwaysMemory (Pillar II) and PublicBlockchains (Pillar VIII). The caller must supply a valid HybridShield custodian quorum signature. No Merkle root may be anchored without a quorum threshold of custodian signatures.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 8 (Merkle-Batched Anchoring), Pillar VIII. x-tml-pillar: AlwaysMemory, PublicBlockchains, HybridShield.

inputs.name: merkleRoot
inputs.description: SHA-256 Merkle root of the log batch, packed as bytes32.

inputs.name: batchId
inputs.description: Unique identifier for this Merkle batch.

inputs.name: logCount
inputs.description: Number of Moral Trace Log entries included in this batch.

inputs.name: custodianSignatures
inputs.description: Array of ECDSA signatures from HybridShield custodians. Must meet the quorum threshold defined in the custodian registry.

inputs.name: custodianIds
inputs.description: Custodian identifiers corresponding to each signature in custodianSignatures.

outputs.name: anchorId
outputs.description: On-chain identifier for this anchored Merkle root record.

outputs.name: anchoredAt
outputs.description: Block timestamp at which the Merkle root was anchored.

abi.name: registerPermissionToken
abi.description: Registers a Permission Token on-chain, binding it to its authorizing Moral Trace Log hash and Merkle root. This is the on-chain enforcement of No Log = No Action: a Permission Token cannot be registered without a previously anchored Merkle root containing its logHash.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3, Section 5B.i. x-tml-pillar: AlwaysMemory, MoralTraceLogs.

inputs.name: tokenId
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the Permission Token (UUID v4 packed as bytes32).

inputs.name: logHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the authorizing Moral Trace Log entry.

inputs.name: merkleRoot
inputs.description: Merkle root of the batch containing the authorizing log. Must be a previously anchored root.

inputs.name: signerKeyId
inputs.description: Key identifier of the HSM signing key that signed this token.

inputs.name: epochTimestamp
inputs.description: Unix epoch timestamp at which the Anchoring Lane issued the token.

inputs.name: signatureValue
inputs.description: HSM signature over the canonical token fields.

outputs.name: registered
outputs.description: True if registration succeeded. False if logHash is not included in the supplied merkleRoot, enforcing No Log = No Action on-chain.

abi.name: verifyPermissionToken
abi.description: Verifies that a Permission Token is validly registered, unexpired, and bound to an anchored Moral Trace Log. Read-only. Used by the actuation layer before executing any State +1 action.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3, Section 5B.i. x-tml-pillar: AlwaysMemory, MoralTraceLogs.

inputs.name: currentTimestamp
inputs.description: Current block timestamp used for expiry check.

outputs.name: valid
outputs.description: True if the token is registered, unexpired, and its logHash is anchored.

outputs.name: reason
outputs.description: Human-readable reason for invalid status. Empty string when valid is true.

abi.name: verifyMerkleInclusion
abi.description: Verifies that a log entry hash is included in a previously anchored Merkle root via a supplied inclusion proof path.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 8, Pillar VIII (PublicBlockchains). x-tml-pillar: PublicBlockchains, MoralTraceLogs.

inputs.name: merkleRoot
inputs.description: The anchored Merkle root to verify against.

inputs.name: logHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the log entry (leaf node).

inputs.name: inclusionPath
inputs.description: Ordered sibling hashes from leaf to root.

inputs.name: pathPositions
inputs.description: Position flags corresponding to inclusionPath. True = sibling is on the right; false = sibling is on the left.

outputs.name: included
outputs.description: True if the logHash is provably included in the merkleRoot.

abi.name: activateSacredZeroSystemWide
abi.description: Activates a system-wide Sacred Zero state, suspending all Permission Token registration and issuance until resolved by a human authority with supreme authority credentials. Logs the activation event on-chain before taking effect (No Log = No Action).
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.2 (SacredZero), Section 13.3 (Emergency Override). x-tml-pillar: SacredZero, AlwaysMemory, HybridShield.

inputs.name: escalationId
inputs.description: Identifier of the Sacred Zero escalation triggering this system-wide activation.

inputs.name: justificationHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the justification document for this activation.

inputs.name: custodianSignatures
inputs.description: Quorum custodian signatures authorizing system-wide Sacred Zero activation.

abi.name: resolveSacredZeroSystemWide
abi.description: Resolves an active system-wide Sacred Zero state under supreme authority. Resolution must specify a terminal state: -1 (Refuse, encoded as 0) or +1 (Proceed, encoded as 1). State 0 is not a valid resolution. Resolution is logged on-chain before state transition.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.2, Section 13.3. x-tml-pillar: SacredZero, AlwaysMemory.

inputs.name: activationId
inputs.description: The activation ID returned by activateSacredZeroSystemWide.

inputs.name: resolvedState
inputs.description: Resolution state. 0 = REFUSE (-1 in triadic space). 1 = PROCEED (+1 in triadic space). No other values are accepted.

inputs.name: supremeAuthoritySignature
inputs.description: Signature from a registered supreme authority identity.

abi.name: executeEmergencyOverride
abi.description: Executes an Emergency Override under Section 13.3 supreme authority. Supports BREAK_GLASS_SHUTDOWN (type 0), KILL_SWITCH (type 1), and FORCED_STATE_TRANSITION (type 2). Logs the override on-chain before any state change. No Log = No Action applies without exception.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 13.3. x-tml-pillar: SacredZero, AlwaysMemory, HybridShield.

inputs.name: overrideType
inputs.description: 0 = BREAK_GLASS_SHUTDOWN. 1 = KILL_SWITCH. 2 = FORCED_STATE_TRANSITION.

inputs.name: targetDecisionId
inputs.description: Required when overrideType is 2 (FORCED_STATE_TRANSITION). Zero bytes32 otherwise.

inputs.name: forcedState
inputs.description: Required when overrideType is 2. 0 = REFUSE. 255 = SACRED_ZERO. Forced transition to PROCEED (+1) is not permitted via this function.

outputs.name: overrideId
outputs.description: On-chain identifier for this override event record.

abi.name: getAnchoredMerkleRoot
abi.description: Returns metadata for a previously anchored Merkle root.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 8. x-tml-pillar: PublicBlockchains.

abi.name: getSystemState
abi.description: Returns the current system-wide triadic state and emergency status.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3, Section 13.3. x-tml-pillar: SacredZero.

outputs.name: systemState
outputs.description: 0 = NORMAL_OPERATION. 1 = SACRED_ZERO_SYSTEM_WIDE. 2 = BREAK_GLASS_ACTIVE. 3 = KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE.

abi.name: monographVersion
abi.description: Returns the canonical monograph version this contract was deployed against.

abi.name: registerTriCameralProposal
abi.description: Registers a Tri-Cameral governance proposal on-chain. Survivability-class proposals - those modifying the NL=NA enforcement chain, the three-state model, the Eight Pillar definitions, chamber composition, quorum thresholds, or any schema const, required, or unevaluatedProperties constraint - automatically trigger the Section 7A dual-vote protocol. The proposer's chamber membership is suspended on submission. The 180-day evaluation clock starts at submission regardless of vacancy status. Emits TriCameralProposalRegistered on success.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: TML Constitutionalization Monograph v3.3, Section III, Section 7A. x-tml-pillar: HybridShield.

inputs.name: proposalId
inputs.description: Unique identifier for this governance proposal.

inputs.name: proposerChamber
inputs.description: 0 = TechnicalCouncil. Only Technical Council members may submit proposals. Stewardship Custodians hold veto rights only.

inputs.name: proposerMemberId
inputs.description: Identity of the proposing Technical Council member. Membership suspended on submission.

inputs.name: proposalHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the full proposal text.

inputs.name: survivabilityClass
inputs.description: True if this proposal modifies the NL=NA enforcement chain, three-state model, Eight Pillar definitions, chamber composition, quorum thresholds, or any schema const, required, or unevaluatedProperties constraint. Triggers Section 7A dual-vote protocol.

inputs.name: proposerSignature
inputs.description: EIP-712 signature from the proposing member confirming submission and acknowledging chamber suspension.

outputs.name: clockStartTimestamp
outputs.description: Unix epoch timestamp at which the 180-day evaluation window begins. Set at submission regardless of vacancy status.

abi.name: recordTriCameralVote
abi.description: Records a Tri-Cameral chamber vote on a registered proposal. Technical Council (9 members, proposal rights only) votes are advisory. Stewardship Custodian (11 members) votes carry binding veto authority: a vetoExercised=true submission constitutionally blocks the proposal regardless of Technical Council vote count. For survivability-class proposals, two votes are required: voteNumber=1 after the first 180-day window and voteNumber=2 after the second 180-day window. Both must reach 75% approval calculated against seatedActiveMembers only. Vacant seats and quarantined new appointees count as abstain. Emits TriCameralVoteRecorded. Emits TriCameralConstitutionalVeto if vetoExercised=true.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: TML Constitutionalization Monograph v3.3, Section III, Section 7A. x-tml-pillar: HybridShield.

inputs.name: proposalId
inputs.description: Proposal identifier matching a registered proposal.

inputs.name: chamber
inputs.description: 0 = TechnicalCouncil (9 members, proposal rights only). 1 = StewardshipCustodians (11 members, binding veto).

inputs.name: votesFor
inputs.description: Votes in favour. Maximum 9 for Technical Council, 11 for Stewardship Custodians.

inputs.name: votesAgainst
inputs.description: Votes against.

inputs.name: votesAbstain
inputs.description: Abstentions including vacant seats and quarantined new appointees.

inputs.name: seatedActiveMembers
inputs.description: Active non-quarantined members at time of vote. Quorum threshold calculated against this value only.

inputs.name: vetoExercised
inputs.description: Stewardship Custodians only. If true, proposal is constitutionally blocked regardless of vote counts. Reverts if chamber=0 (Technical Council has no veto rights).

inputs.name: voteNumber
inputs.description: 1 = first vote after initial 180-day window. 2 = second vote after second 180-day window. Only relevant for survivability-class proposals requiring dual-vote ratification.

inputs.name: chamberAttestation
inputs.description: ABI-encoded array of EIP-712 member signatures attesting to the vote tally.

outputs.name: proposalBlocked
outputs.description: True if vetoExercised=true or quorum threshold not met. Blocked proposals cannot be resubmitted by the same institution for one year.

outputs.name: ratified
outputs.description: True if both chambers have passed at 75% and all Section 7A requirements satisfied. For survivability-class proposals, requires voteNumber=2 to be true.

abi.name: executeTriCameralRatification
abi.description: Executes the Smart Contract Treasury disbursement and on-chain state update for a fully ratified Tri-Cameral proposal. The Smart Contract Treasury has no admin key and no human override path. Execution is automatic once both chambers have passed at the required threshold and all Section 7A requirements are satisfied. Reverts TriCameralNotRatified if called before ratification is complete. Emits TriCameralRatificationExecuted on success.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: TML Constitutionalization Monograph v3.3, Section III. x-tml-pillar: HybridShield. Smart Contract Treasury: automatic execution, no admin key, no human override.

inputs.name: proposalId
inputs.description: Proposal identifier for a fully ratified governance proposal.

inputs.name: treasuryAttestation
inputs.description: ABI-encoded Smart Contract Treasury execution proof. Generated automatically by the Treasury contract; no human can supply or modify this value.

outputs.name: executionTransactionHash
outputs.description: On-chain transaction hash of the Treasury execution event.

outputs.name: executedAt
outputs.description: Unix epoch timestamp of Treasury execution.

abi.name: MerkleRootAnchored
abi.description: Emitted when a Moral Trace Log batch Merkle root is successfully anchored on-chain.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 8, Pillar VIII. x-tml-pillar: PublicBlockchains, AlwaysMemory.

abi.name: PermissionTokenRegistered
abi.description: Emitted when a Permission Token is successfully registered on-chain, confirming No Log = No Action enforcement.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3, Section 5B.i. x-tml-pillar: AlwaysMemory, MoralTraceLogs.

abi.name: SacredZeroActivated
abi.description: Emitted when a Sacred Zero state is activated, either for a single decision or system-wide. The Sacred Pause operational workflow begins upon this event.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.2. x-tml-pillar: SacredZero.

abi.name: SacredZeroResolved
abi.description: Emitted when a Sacred Zero escalation is resolved by a human authority. resolvedState: 0 = REFUSE, 1 = PROCEED.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.2. x-tml-pillar: SacredZero, HumanRightsMandate.

abi.name: EmergencyOverrideExecuted
abi.description: Emitted when an Emergency Override is executed under Section 13.3 supreme authority. Logged on-chain before any state change takes effect.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 13.3. x-tml-pillar: SacredZero, AlwaysMemory, HybridShield.

abi.name: LanternStatusBroadcast
abi.description: Emitted when the Goukassian Promise Lantern signal is updated on-chain. Provides an immutable on-chain record of each compliance beacon broadcast.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.4 (GoukassianPromise: lantern). x-tml-pillar: GoukassianPromise.

inputs.name: compliancePosture
inputs.description: 0 = FULLY_COMPLIANT. 1 = SACRED_ZERO_ACTIVE. 2 = PARTIAL_COMPLIANCE. 3 = EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE_ACTIVE. 4 = DEGRADED.

inputs.name: signatureHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the Goukassian Promise Signature Block signing this broadcast.

abi.name: TriCameralConstitutionalVeto
abi.description: Emitted when the Stewardship Custodians exercise their binding veto on a governance proposal. The proposal is constitutionally blocked. The proposer's institution ban clock starts at this timestamp. No re-submission is permitted from the same institution for one year.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: TML Constitutionalization Monograph v3.3, Section III. x-tml-pillar: HybridShield.

inputs.name: proposalId
inputs.description: Proposal identifier that has been constitutionally blocked.

inputs.name: vetoTimestamp
inputs.description: Unix epoch timestamp of veto. Institution ban active for one year from this timestamp.

inputs.name: survivabilityClass
inputs.description: Whether the vetoed proposal was survivability-class.

abi.name: NoLogNoAction
abi.description: Reverts when a Permission Token registration is attempted for a logHash not included in any anchored Merkle root. On-chain enforcement of the No Log = No Action iron law.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3.

abi.name: SacredZeroSystemWideActive
abi.description: Reverts when any Permission Token registration or Merkle anchoring is attempted while a system-wide Sacred Zero state is active.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.2, Section 13.3.

abi.name: QuorumNotMet
abi.description: Reverts when a custodian quorum threshold is not met for operations requiring HybridShield authorization.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3, Pillar VII (HybridShield).

abi.name: InvalidResolutionState
abi.description: Reverts when a Sacred Zero resolution attempts to resolve to State 0. State 0 is not a valid resolution state; terminal resolution must be +1 or -1.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.2.

abi.name: UnauthorizedSupremeAuthority
abi.description: Reverts when an Emergency Override caller is not a registered supreme authority identity.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 13.3.

abi.name: TokenExpired
abi.description: Reverts when a Permission Token is presented for verification after its expiresAt timestamp.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 5B.i.

abi.name: TriCameralNotRatified
abi.description: Reverts when executeTriCameralRatification is called for a proposal that has not yet achieved full ratification. For survivability-class proposals, both voteNumber=1 and voteNumber=2 must pass at 75% in both chambers before this error clears.

inputs.name: proposalId
inputs.description: The proposal that is not yet ratified.

inputs.name: missingRequirement
inputs.description: Human-readable description of the unmet ratification requirement.

ITMLEnforcer.description: Interface for TML mandate enforcement. Implements on-chain verification of the Human Rights Mandate (Pillar V, UDHR/Geneva Convention vector enforcement) and the Earth Protection Mandate (Pillar VI, Paris Agreement vector enforcement). All implementations must satisfy this interface for a deployment to be considered TML-compliant.
ITMLEnforcer.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.3.3, Pillar V (HumanRightsMandate), Pillar VI (EarthProtectionMandate). Corresponds to Smart_Contracts/src/ITMLEnforcer.sol.

abi.name: verifyHumanRightsCompliance
abi.description: Verifies that a proposed action vector does not violate the Human Rights Mandate. Checks the action against UDHR Article and Geneva Convention provision vectors. Returns false and a violation code if any registered provision is implicated at or above the configured severity threshold.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Pillar V (HumanRightsMandate). x-tml-pillar: HumanRightsMandate.

inputs.name: decisionId
inputs.description: The decision identifier being evaluated.

inputs.name: actionVectorHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical serialization of the proposed action vector.

inputs.name: flaggedProvisions
inputs.description: Array of hashed UDHR Article and Geneva Convention provision identifiers flagged by the Inference Lane (e.g., keccak256('UDHR-Art-3')).

inputs.name: severityLevels
inputs.description: Severity levels corresponding to each flagged provision. 0 = LOW, 1 = MEDIUM, 2 = HIGH, 3 = CRITICAL.

outputs.name: compliant
outputs.description: True if no Human Rights Mandate violation is detected.

outputs.name: violationCode
outputs.description: Hash of the most severe violated provision. Zero bytes32 when compliant is true.

outputs.name: forcedState
outputs.description: Mandated triadic state when compliant is false. 0 = SACRED_ZERO (mandatory hesitation). 255 = REFUSE (hard block). Callers must respect this mandate.

abi.name: verifyEarthProtectionCompliance
abi.description: Verifies that a proposed action vector does not violate the Earth Protection Mandate. Checks the action against Paris Agreement article and climate target vectors. Returns false and a violation code if any registered provision is implicated at or above the configured severity threshold.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Pillar VI (EarthProtectionMandate). x-tml-pillar: EarthProtectionMandate.

inputs.name: flaggedProvisions
inputs.description: Array of hashed Paris Agreement provision identifiers flagged by the Inference Lane (e.g., keccak256('PA-Art-2.1a')).

outputs.name: forcedState
outputs.description: 0 = SACRED_ZERO. 255 = REFUSE.

abi.name: verifyGoukassianLicense
abi.description: Verifies the Goukassian Promise License artifact for a requesting entity. The license artifact is identified by its canonical name 'license'. A failed verification is a mandatory trigger for State -1 (Refuse).
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.4 (GoukassianPromise: license). x-tml-pillar: GoukassianPromise.

inputs.name: licenseTokenHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the license token being validated.

inputs.name: requestingEntityId
inputs.description: Hash of the requesting entity identity.

outputs.name: violationType
outputs.description: 0 = NO_VIOLATION. 1 = LANTERN_SUPPRESSION. 2 = SIGNATURE_FORGERY. 3 = LICENSE_BREACH. 4 = PROVENANCE_TAMPERING. 5 = UNAUTHORIZED_STATE_TRANSITION.

outputs.name: violatedArtifact
outputs.description: 0 = NO_ARTIFACT. 1 = lantern. 2 = signature. 3 = license. Artifact ordinals correspond to canonical Goukassian Promise artifact names.

abi.name: recordMandateViolation
abi.description: Records a confirmed mandate violation on-chain. Called by TML_Core when a verifyHumanRightsCompliance or verifyEarthProtectionCompliance check returns non-compliant. The violation record is immutable (AlwaysMemory).
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Pillar V, Pillar VI, Pillar II (AlwaysMemory). x-tml-pillar: HumanRightsMandate, EarthProtectionMandate, AlwaysMemory.

inputs.name: mandateType
inputs.description: 0 = HUMAN_RIGHTS_MANDATE. 1 = EARTH_PROTECTION_MANDATE.

inputs.name: violationEvidenceHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the off-chain violation evidence package.

abi.name: getMandateConfiguration
abi.description: Returns the current configuration of registered UDHR/Geneva and Paris Agreement provisions and their severity thresholds. Read-only. Used by auditors to verify mandate coverage.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Pillar V, Pillar VI. x-tml-pillar: HumanRightsMandate, EarthProtectionMandate.

inputs.name: mandateType
inputs.description: 0 = HUMAN_RIGHTS_MANDATE. 1 = EARTH_PROTECTION_MANDATE.

outputs.name: provisionCount
outputs.description: Number of registered provisions for this mandate.

outputs.name: configurationHash
outputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the full provision registry at its current state.

abi.name: HumanRightsMandateViolationDetected
abi.description: Emitted when a Human Rights Mandate violation is detected during compliance verification. Triggers the automatic Sacred Zero or Refuse state transition.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Pillar V (HumanRightsMandate). x-tml-pillar: HumanRightsMandate, SacredZero.

abi.name: EarthProtectionMandateViolationDetected
abi.description: Emitted when an Earth Protection Mandate violation is detected during compliance verification. Triggers the automatic Sacred Zero or Refuse state transition.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Pillar VI (EarthProtectionMandate). x-tml-pillar: EarthProtectionMandate, SacredZero.

abi.name: GoukassianLicenseViolationDetected
abi.description: Emitted when a Goukassian Promise license verification fails. violatedArtifact ordinals: 1 = lantern, 2 = signature, 3 = license.
abi.$comment: Monograph ref: Section 2.4 (GoukassianPromise). x-tml-pillar: GoukassianPromise.

abi.name: MandateNotConfigured
abi.description: Reverts when a mandate verification is requested for a mandateType that has not been configured in the enforcer.

abi.name: ProvisionArrayMismatch
abi.description: Reverts when flaggedProvisions and severityLevels arrays are not the same length.
